content: Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep
name: Blockade
description: Blockade is a Seraph shield from Anshin introduced in the Dragon Keep add-on. It is valued for its reliable defensive stats and an always-on damage reduction effect. The reduction helps blunt heavy incoming damage, including explosive hits and raid boss attacks.
notes: The damage reduction does not work as shown on the card. The reduction is a fixed percentage based on level and parts and it applies even when the shield is depleted. At OP8, the highest reduction achievable with Hyperion parts is about 45.7%, slightly under an optimal Antagonist at roughly 49%. It cannot spawn with Maliwan parts. Despite being branded Anshin, it uses a Hyperion-style model, does not provide the usual Anshin maximum health bonus, and is the only Anshin shield that is not Adaptive.

special.description: Provides constant damage reduction. The listed extra reduction while the shield is full is bugged and does not apply. Passive reduction: 0.5% x shield level + 7.5%. Intended full-shield bonus: 5% x shield level. Damage taken is calculated as damage / (1 + damage reduction).
special.title: Am I living or am I dying?

abilities: Provides major damage resistance when fully charged, and moderate damage resistance when not fully charged.
